title: Blue Canyon Nonslip Antibacterial Rubber Bath Mats, Quick Dry Bath Rug with Suction Pads & Drain Holes, Mould Resistant Bathroom Accessory, Durable Bath Rug Runner 34 x 74 cm – Pink
features: 【 DURABLE RUBBER MATERIAL 】: You will definitely appreciate the luxury of standing on the Blue Canyon flexible & comfy bath mat made from Rubber, as it supports your ankles and feet to stand with utmost relief for a more extended period. The Rubber material of this rug is enjoyable on the skin, helps ease the stress on joints, and maintains a good posture.

【 EASY WATER DRAINAGE 】: Our Blue Canyon Rubber bath runner rug comes with hundreds of drainage holes that allow water to easily flow under the mat and towards the drain, helping to prevent water from sitting stagnant under the mat in your tub & hence prevent mould formation.

【 ANTI-SLIP BACKING 】: Don’t worry about being fractured from dangerous slips and slides while getting out of your bathroom. Our high-performance Bath rug mat stays where you place it, as they come with the backing of suction pads, making it slip-resistant & eliminating the need for constant readjustments, and keeping your loved ones from falling.

【 MULTIPURPOSE USE 】: Our Blue Canyon Rubber luxury floor mats are great for hallways, entryways, family/living rooms, bedrooms, home offices, kitchens, dining rooms, drawing rooms, and anywhere from low traffic to elevated areas of your home. Each Pedestaling makes any room in your home livelier and more comfortable, adding a subtle yet profound accent to any room in your house.

【 FANCIFUL STYLING 】: Make your home decor fun with our vibrant Rubber Bath Mat runners! These Pedestal mat rugs are suitable for most interior designs. Our fanciful styling door mats are available in classic patterns. You can layer them or mix and match them according to your room themes as they are designed keeping in mind the trending interior designing accessories.
description: From the brand Previous page About Us:- Blue Canyon is a privately owned importing and distribution company, bringing both expertise and a fully managed supply chain, we believe that the little things make a big difference. We offer a wide variety of bathroom accessories that are both stylish and functional. We have everything you need to create a bathroom that is both beautiful and practical, from toothbrush holders and soap dishes to towel racks and mirrors. Bathroom Shower Caddies Visit the store Door Stopper Visit the store Over Bath Racks Visit the store Shower Head Water Filter Visit the store Shower Hoses Visit the store Shampoo Sprays Visit the store Shower Sets & Adjusters Visit the store Bathroom Tumblers Visit the store Wooden Toilet Seat Visit the store Toilet Brush & Holder Visit the store Cotton Bath & Pedestal Mat Set Visit the store Pedal Bin Visit the store Soap Dispenser Bottle Visit the store Shower Curtains Visit the store The Gecko Products Visit the store Wall Mount BathroomAccessories Visit the store Flora Waste Bin Visit the store Our Ethos:- Bathroom accessories should be both functional and stylish. We offer a wide range of products that are designed to make your bathroom look and feel its best. Our products are made from high-quality materials and are built to last. Our product line:- Welcome to Blue Canyon, where we include a wide variety of items to help you organize and style your bathroom. From towel racks and soap dishes to toothbrush holders and toilet paper holders, we have everything you need to make your bathroom look its best. Shop our collection today and experience the Blue Canyon difference! Next page
